Klasse CsvDataService

java.lang.Object
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.service.csv.CsvDataService
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
DataService<Object>
public class CsvDataService extends Object implements DataService<Object>
Converts raw CSV rows into individuals for use in evolutionary algorithms.

Each row of the CSV input is transformed into an Individual consisting of multiple Chromosome objects. Every cell in a row becomes a chromosome containing exactly one parsed value. The service attempts to automatically interpret each cell as an Integer, Double, or Boolean; if none of these conversions succeed, the value is kept as a String.

This makes the service suitable for generic CSV datasets where the type of each column is not known in advance. The resulting individuals can be used directly by the genetic algorithm framework.

    • CsvDataService

  • Methodendetails

    • processData

      public List<Individual<Object>> processData(List<String[]> rawData)
      Converts raw CSV data into a list of individuals.

      Each row becomes one individual, and each cell becomes a chromosome containing a single parsed value.

      Angegeben von:
      processData in Schnittstelle DataService<Object>
      Parameter:
      rawData - the raw CSV rows
      Gibt zurück:
      a list of individuals created from the CSV content
